hero.headline: I build things
hero.subtitle: Fullstack developer on alternance since September 2022, 3rd-year CS. Production code alongside the degree.

about.name: Tom Bertomeu
about.subtitle:
Third year of a Computer Science degree (BUT Informatique) at IUT Nord Franche-Comté, on a work-study contract since September 2022. Three years of alternating between university and a company means real production code, real deadlines, and actual users alongside the curriculum.

I build fullstack web and mobile apps: React, Next.js, TypeScript on the frontend, various backends. The details that usually get cut (accessibility, edge cases, performance on real devices) are the ones I care about most. Outside of code: motorsport and video games.
about.school: Computer Science BUT ⋅ IUT Nord Franche-Comté
